name: Niharika Arun
headline: Purdue MSBAIM · Former Deloitte USI Data Engineer
tagline: From analytics to applied AI, I build decision-ready systems.
summary: Hi, I'm Niharika Arun, an AI and analytics professional with hands-on experience delivering high-impact data solutions at Deloitte USI for leading U.S. energy clients and a growing focus on LLMs and AI agents for decision support and automation. I engineered 100+ SQL views and stored procedures, cut query execution time by 95%, and built 20+ DBT models in Snowflake to produce trusted datasets, now applying that foundation to build knowledge-based assistants, workflow automations, and performance dashboards.
